name: Asian Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the ginger root in cold water for a few minutes to loosen the outer skin.
2. Remove the outer skin of the ginger and cut it into chunks.
3. Combine all ingredients in a food processor fitted with the steel blade.
4. Blend until smooth and creamy.
5. Refrigerate the dressing.
Often, in Japanese restaurants, this dressing is served over finely shredded cabbage along with lettuce and other salad ingredients. It is delicious.
